text_block_list.text:
Before the race, two unexpected visitors come to
Nice Nature's waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hello, Nature. How are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, you seem ready! I'm excited
for today!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Ryan! What brings you all the way
here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We had some business nearby, so we dropped by
your race to check out the competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's just making excuses. Honestly, we were
worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen saw you looking pretty blue at the
academy a little while ago.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan! You promised not to mention that!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: By a little while ago, you mean...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna run! I'm scared to run!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It was probably around that time. Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you for your concern, but... I'm fine
now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to give everything I've got to win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can see it in your eyes—doubt no longer clouds
them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'm relieved. It's hard to be satisfied
with a win when your rival isn't at their best.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Rival?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: We're running at the end of the year too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You mean... at the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to competing with an even
stronger version of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Today, we'll just be cheering you on from the
stands! Go, Nature, go!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
McQueen and Ryan are both showing me their
support...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They must believe that I'll get first place here and
go to the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
High expectations like that are a heavy burden as
usual. But...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me. First place will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Hometown Fans
text_block_list.text: Natieeee! Hold your head high!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Everyone from the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: We're here too! Go get iiiit!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you guys too! What is this, a National
Shopping District Association meeting?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
With the Mejiros being here too, it's starting to
feel like a series finale.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But it's not. It's still one step before shining glory.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And in order to take that step... I have to win!
